stepResults.description: CLIENT signs up
stepResults.layman: Create the client account that will create a booking and submit the duo rating.

stepResults.description: Extract CLIENT verification token from Mailpit
stepResults.layman: Grab the email verification token so the client can log in.

stepResults.description: Verify CLIENT email
stepResults.layman: Verify the client email address.

stepResults.description: Login CLIENT
stepResults.layman: Log the client in and store their Bearer token.

stepResults.description: COMPANION A signs up (intended CAPTAIN)
stepResults.layman: Create the companion that we will force to be the CAPTAIN for deterministic matching steps.

stepResults.description: Extract COMPANION A verification token from Mailpit
stepResults.layman: Grab companion A's verification token so they can log in.

stepResults.description: Verify COMPANION A email
stepResults.layman: Verify companion A's email address.

stepResults.description: Login COMPANION A
stepResults.layman: Log companion A in and store their Bearer token.

stepResults.description: COMPANION B signs up (intended VICE_CAPTAIN)
stepResults.layman: Create the companion that we will force to be the VICE_CAPTAIN for deterministic matching steps.

stepResults.description: Extract COMPANION B verification token from Mailpit
stepResults.layman: Grab companion B's verification token so they can log in.

stepResults.description: Verify COMPANION B email
stepResults.layman: Verify companion B's email address.

stepResults.description: Login COMPANION B
stepResults.layman: Log companion B in and store their Bearer token.

stepResults.description: Force COMPANION A designation to CAPTAIN (test-only determinism)
stepResults.layman: Make companion A the CAPTAIN deterministically so we can use CAPTAIN-only matching endpoints.

stepResults.description: Force COMPANION B designation to VICE_CAPTAIN (test-only determinism)
stepResults.layman: Make companion B the VICE_CAPTAIN deterministically so we can use VICE-only com-match verification.

stepResults.description: Populate roster for CAPTAIN at Ratings venue
stepResults.layman: Attach the CAPTAIN to the journey venue and generate roster availability slots.

stepResults.description: Populate roster for VICE_CAPTAIN at Ratings venue
stepResults.layman: Attach the VICE_CAPTAIN to the journey venue and generate roster availability slots.

stepResults.description: Client fetches availability for Ratings venue (today) and selects first startAt
stepResults.layman: Get a valid, bookable start time so booking creation is deterministic and uses real availability.

stepResults.description: Client creates booking at first available start time
stepResults.layman: Create a booking that allocates a CAPTAIN+VICE duo at the journey venue.

stepResults.description: Mark both companions ARRIVED (test-only) to unlock com-match context/verify
stepResults.layman: Simulate both companions arriving at the venue so self-match can proceed (com-match requires ARRIVED for both).

stepResults.description: CAPTAIN fetches com-match context (QR/PIN for self-match)
stepResults.layman: Retrieve the QR/PIN needed for the VICE_CAPTAIN to verify companion-companion self-match.

stepResults.description: VICE_CAPTAIN verifies com-match using CAPTAIN QR
stepResults.layman: Complete companion-companion self-match so client match verification becomes allowed.

stepResults.description: CLIENT starts client-match (location sharing) within venue radius
stepResults.layman: Start the client matching flow, proving the client is physically at the venue (within radius).

stepResults.description: CLIENT fetches matching context to obtain client QR/PIN
stepResults.layman: Fetch the client QR/PIN that the CAPTAIN will use to verify client match.

stepResults.description: CAPTAIN verifies client-match using client's QR (booking becomes ACTIVE)
stepResults.layman: Complete client-companion matching and transition the booking into ACTIVE state.

stepResults.description: DB check: booking status is ACTIVE after matching
stepResults.layman: Prove the system transitioned the booking to ACTIVE after client-match verify.

stepResults.description: Simulate end-of-session completion (test-only)
stepResults.layman: Transition booking into a rating-eligible end state (COMPLETED) in a deterministic way for the journey.

stepResults.description: Release roster slots for the booking (internal)
stepResults.layman: Mirror the auto-end side effect by releasing booked roster slots.

stepResults.description: DB check: booking status is COMPLETED
stepResults.layman: Prove the booking is now in COMPLETED state, which is eligible for rating submission.

stepResults.description: CLIENT submits CLIENT_RATING_DUO (stars present, tags>=1, comment<=300)
stepResults.layman: Submit the client duo rating with non-null stars to trigger average_rating recomputation.

stepResults.description: API response validation: client rating created
stepResults.layman: Verify the rating creation response payload matches the expected contract and inferred ratingType.

observed.sql: SELECT * FROM "booking_ratings" WHERE booking_id = $1 AND rating_type = 'CLIENT_RATING_DUO' AND rater_user_id = $2 LIMIT 50;

stepResults.description: DB check: booking_ratings row exists for CLIENT_RATING_DUO
stepResults.layman: Prove the immutable booking_ratings row was created for the client duo rating.

stepResults.description: DB check: CAPTAIN average_rating recomputed
stepResults.layman: Verify the CAPTAIN companion profile average_rating was updated based on CLIENT_RATING_DUO with non-null stars.

stepResults.description: DB check: VICE_CAPTAIN average_rating recomputed
stepResults.layman: Verify the VICE_CAPTAIN companion profile average_rating was updated based on the same CLIENT_RATING_DUO.

stepResults.description: CAPTAIN submits COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT
stepResults.layman: Exercise multi-role usage of the same endpoint: a companion rates the client (stars mandatory).

stepResults.description: API response validation: captain rating created
stepResults.layman: Verify the companion rating response uses COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT and includes the expected fields.

stepResults.description: VICE_CAPTAIN submits COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT
stepResults.layman: Confirm a second companion can independently rate the client for the same booking.

stepResults.description: API response validation: vice-captain rating created
stepResults.layman: Verify the vice captain rating is created and returned with the correct inferred ratingType.

observed.sql: SELECT * FROM "booking_ratings" WHERE booking_id = $1 AND rating_type = 'COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT' AND rater_user_id = $2 LIMIT 50;

stepResults.description: DB check: captain COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT row exists
stepResults.layman: Prove the captain's companion rating row exists in booking_ratings.

observed.sql: SELECT * FROM "booking_ratings" WHERE booking_id = $1 AND rating_type = 'COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT' AND rater_user_id = $2 LIMIT 50;

stepResults.description: DB check: vice-captain COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT row exists
stepResults.layman: Prove the vice captain's companion rating row exists in booking_ratings.

stepResults.description: DB check: companion average_rating unchanged by companion->client ratings (captain)
stepResults.layman: Verify companion_profiles.average_rating remains driven only by CLIENT_RATING_DUO rows (companion ratings should not affect it).

stepResults.description: DB check: companion average_rating unchanged by companion->client ratings (vice)
stepResults.layman: Verify the vice captain's average_rating also remains unchanged after companion ratings.
